description_long: This is a plush toy designed to resemble a cartoon panda bear, featuring a large, rounded white head with two brown ears and big, expressive eyes. The face is simple, with circular brown markings around the eyes and a small, subtle nose and mouth. The body is predominantly brown with a white belly patch, and the arms and legs are short and rounded, giving it a cute and approachable appearance. The toy's proportions are exaggerated, with a head much larger than the body, enhancing its playful and child-friendly look. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of stuffed toys, and the seams are smooth and unobtrusive. This toy would likely be found in parks, playgrounds, or urban family spaces, inviting children to hug or carry it.
description: A soft, cartoon-style panda bear stuffed toy with a large white head, brown ears, and a brown-and-white body. Its big eyes and rounded limbs give it a cute, approachable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the panda's large white face, brown ears, big round eyes, and the white belly patch on its brown body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded profile of the head, protruding ear, and the side of the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, both brown, with the ears visible and no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the head, ear, and the arm and leg from this angle.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is wide-eyed and neutral, with large, round eyes and a small, subtle mouth, giving it a curious and friendly appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs together, head facing forward.
